creator: peter.larsen@larsendata.dk
text:
After the last update, a new error was introduced, seen on both builds (not fatal) and dryruns, and status requests:

root@builder:~ # poudriere status -f
mapfile_write: Illegal option -
=>> Error: mapfile_write
root@builder:~ #

please note error only appear on builds if there is actually packages to be build



building on 13.2-RELEASE-p4, target 13.2-RELEASE-p4, on amd64
